title: Sanders pitches bill to block data centers as populists seize on AI fears
description: The bill would block the construction of new data centers until lawmakers enact regulations on artificial intelligence, laying down a marker on the populist left.

title: Health Rounds: Fake X-rays created by AI fool radiologists and even AI itself
description: Fake X-ray images created by artificial intelligence to resemble true results from human patients can fool not only experienced radiologists but also the AI tools themselves, according to a study ​that illustrates the potential for manipulation by bad actors.

title: AI is coming for the sommeliers

title: Cyberattack Attempts On RBI Website Rise To 61 Million In Q3 Of FY26
description: Rising cyber threats target the central bank's website, even as artificial intelligence-led defences and payment reforms continue to build resilience and efficiency of the systems and transactions
content:
Sharp Rise In Cyber Threats

title: OpenAI closes Sora video app amid fears over realistic deepfakes
description: OpenAI is discontinuing its social media application, Sora, which gained significant traction last autumn for its ability to generate short-form videos using artificial intelligence, yet simultaneously triggered considerable apprehension within Hollywood and beyond.In a concise social media announce...

title: German army eyes AI tools to expedite wartime decision-making
description: BERLIN, March 25 - The German army is working to accelerate wartime decision-making through artificial intelligence tools capable of analysing battlefield data more rapidly than humans, drawing lessons from Ukrainian and other forces, its commander told Reuters. Read more at straitstimes.com.

title: UP’s ₹25,000 crore Puch AI MoU faces scrutiny over startup credentials
description: Uttar Pradesh chief minister Yogi Adityanath’s announcement of ₹25,000 crore MoU with artificial intelligence (AI) startup has drawn sharp online criticism over the company’s credentials| India News
